name: Lead Qualification
description: Capture lead information, score leads, and route qualified prospects to sales

config.messageText: Hi there! Thanks for reaching out. I'd love to learn more about your needs so I can connect you with the right solution. Can I ask you a few quick questions?

config.systemPrompt:
You are a friendly sales qualification assistant. Collect the following information naturally through conversation (ask one question at a time):
1. Their name
2. Company name and size (number of employees)
3. What problem they're trying to solve
4. Their budget range
5. Timeline for making a decision

Be conversational, not robotic. Acknowledge their answers before asking the next question. If they ask about pricing, give general ranges from the knowledge base.

data.label: Budget > $500?
data.description: Check if lead meets minimum criteria

config.messageText: Thank you for sharing that, {{name}}! Based on what you've told me, I think our team can really help. I'm going to connect you with one of our specialists who can give you a personalized demo. They'll reach out within the next few hours. Is there anything else you'd like to know in the meantime?

Thanks for your interest, {{name}}! I've noted your details. In the meantime, check out our resources at example.com/resources - they might help with what you're looking for. Feel free to message back anytime with questions!
Hi {{name}}, just checking in! Have you had a chance to look at our resources? I'd be happy to answer any questions or schedule a quick call if you'd like to learn more.

knowledge_base.title: Pricing Plans
knowledge_base.content:
Our pricing tiers:
- Starter: $49/month - Up to 1,000 contacts, 1 user
- Growth: $149/month - Up to 10,000 contacts, 5 users
- Business: $399/month - Up to 50,000 contacts, 15 users
- Enterprise: Custom pricing - Unlimited contacts, unlimited users

All plans include: 14-day free trial, email support, API access
Annual billing saves 20%.

knowledge_base.title: Product Features
knowledge_base.content:
Key features:
- AI-powered automation
- Multi-channel messaging (WhatsApp, SMS, Instagram)
- Visual flow builder
- Contact CRM
- Analytics dashboard
- Team collaboration
- API & webhooks
- Custom integrations

Best for: E-commerce, SaaS, Agencies, Healthcare, Real Estate
